title: Pet Necropolis
description: Adds compatibility to Pet Cemetery with other mods and their pets.
body:
![Pet Necropolis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fb71f5d626a2b0c1d784a691afcc6012eb5f5c9.png)

![Requires Blueprint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3eae6b1c05d769e8d80443f206c21e597ab7f678.png)

![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0c8d46c88c11f95b8a30f926751ec420371f2df.png)

Pet Necropolis is a compatibility addon for Pet Cemetery that allows tameable animals from other mods to drop pet collars and be resurrected at a respawn anchor.

The mod has special compatibility with [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs), [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves), and [Alex's Caves Exemplified](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves-exemplified) which allows pets to be resurrected as the correct variant.

# IMPORTANT NOTICE
DO NOT REPORT ANY ISSUES SPECIFIC TO THE MOD TO TEAM ABNORMALS. REPORT THEM [HERE](https://github.com/AngelOfCreation/pet-necropolis/issues).
